description: Standalone UI systems built using modular scripts.

systems.name: Particle Background System
systems.description: A highly customizable particle background system with interactive mouse effects and performance optimizations.

prompts.title: Custom Theme Integration
prompts.description: Prompt to help AI integrate the particle system with a specific theme.
prompts.content: Please configure the ParticleBackgroundSystem to match a '{theme_name}' aesthetic. Suggest appropriate values for particleCount, particleColor, and speed. Provide the React component code.

prompts.title: Interactive Hero Section
prompts.description: Prompt to help AI build a hero section with the particle background.
prompts.content: I need to build a hero section for a landing page. Use the ParticleBackgroundSystem as the background layer and place a centered heading and a call-to-action button on top. Ensure proper z-indexing and responsiveness.

systems.name: Neural Data Navigator
systems.description: A 3D visualization system for exploring complex, nested JSON data structures using force-directed graphs.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The JSON data object to visualize
